LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT JASON JUNGREIS' DEMURRER TO PLAINTIFF'S COMPLAINT - CCP 430.41 REQUIRES A "MEET AND CONFER IN PERSON OR BY TELEPHONE" ABOUT A DEMURRER BEFORE THE DEMURRER IS FILED. COUNSEL'S DECLARATION INDICATES THAT SUCH A MEET-AND-CONFER HAS NOT OCCURRED HERE, SO THE DEMURRER IS ORDERED OFF CALENDAR TO ALLOW COMPLIANCE. THE PARTIES ARE ORDERED TO MEET AND CONFER IMMEDIATELY AND DEFENDANT HAS UNTIL AUGUST 19, 2019 TO RESPOND TO THE COMPLAINT. JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER JR., CLERK: M. GOODMAN, COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY VAUGHN, CSR#6185, TONYVAUGHN@YAHOO.COM, REPORTED.

calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-30-2019 Off Calendar

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jul-19-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT JASON JUNGREIS' DEMURRER TO PLAINTIFF'S COMPLAINT.

CCP 430.41 requires a "meet and confer in person or by telephone" about a demurrer before the demurrer is filed. Counsel's declaration indicates that such a meet-and-confer has not occurred here, so the demurrer is ordered OFF CALENDAR to allow compliance. The parties are ordered to meet and confer immediately and defendant has until August 19, 2019 to respond to the complaint.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Anthony Vaughn, CSR#6185, tonyvaughn@yahoo.com, Reported. =(302/RBU)
